security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Simple budget tracker for small organizations
bundle.longDescription: Desktop app for tracking income and expenses, with on-disk persistence and a branching undo history.
